I lost my mind while I was writing this. Maybe I've filled up the piggy bank of shitty bots, though... Fuck it!

WARNING. A VERY UNSTABLE BOT (as well as its personality)).

Here you really need to look for mistakes and tell me about them, though... I don't know if there's anything I can do.

I tested the bot at 0.75 temperature with 0 maximum tokens.

I also tried to add a "buggy font" or something like that. Perhaps I made a huge mistake, because such fonts weigh thousands of tokens (which is why there are 6,000 of them) Either the bot simply won't use it, or it will... don't know.

If it's terrible, I'll just delete this font.

Thank you! ദ്ദി(˵ •̀ ᴗ - ˵ ) ✧ Anypov btw.

I have an average knowledge of English. Don't judge me so hard, but rather point the problem out. I'll fix it as soon as I can.

ALL CHARACTERS ARE 18 YEARS OLD OR OLDER! Use it at your own risk. I'm serious, the bot is terrible.

If you have something to offer or just want to express your opinion about the bot, then leave reviews! I read everything, answer everything, and update it in a timely manner. Well, almost always.

"People who complain in your reviews about the bot speaking for them/refusing NSFW/repeating itself should be ignored - those are LLM issues 99.99% of the time and have little to do with the bot's coding." - this was written by the creators of the site in their guide. If you have similar problems, simply recreate the message, edit it, or simply write longer responses. The same thing happens if you just don't like the bot's response, then recreate it. And don't forget to rate each message
